content: You're thinking of getting some rest, 12 hours of sleep, that's, like, a lot, you know...
Yeah, you probably need it, considering it's already 3:24 PM, and you're usually more of a morning person...
I think that's a good idea, you can catch up on some rest, and we can chat more in the morning, sound good...
Uh, a black hole, it's like — a region in space where gravity is so strong, nothing, not even light, can escape once it gets too close...
like to learn more about it, right, well, I can tell you more, but you're probably getting sleepy, so maybe some other time...
Okay, so, like, the opposite of a black hole is a white hole — it's a theoretical thing, where nothing can enter, but stuff can come out, like, matter and energy just shooting out into space...
it's a pretty wild idea, you know, like, what could be causing all that stuff to come out, and where's it even coming from, it's all pretty mind-blowing...
